source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two rigid tanks are filled with water. Tank A is 0.2 m^3 at 100 kPa, 150\circ\text{C} and tank B is 0.3 m^3 at saturated vapor of 300 kPa. The tanks are connected by a pipe with a closed valve. We open the valve and let all the water come to a single uniform state while we transfer enough heat to have a final pressure of 300 kPa. Find the heat transfer.

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: Two rigid tanks are filled with water. Tank A is 0.2 m^3 at 100 kPa, 150\circ\text{C} and tank B is 0.3 m^3 at saturated vapor of 300 kPa. The tanks are connected by a pipe with a closed valve. We open the valve and let all the water come to a single uniform state while we transfer enough heat to have a final pressure of 300 kPa. Find the heat transfer.
